details.title: Amp It Up!
details.description:
⚡Amp It Up!⚡
Awarded "Best Overall 🥇" in the Kenney Jam 2025 - Power
Post-Jam Update:
Thanks a lot to everyone who played Amp It Up! It was a lot of fun to develop this game and participate in the Kenney Jam. I'm very honored to have been chosen as the best overall and it makes me very excited to continue participating on other jams and creating awesome projects. You should probably check out the other submissions too, there are a lot of hidden gems in there.
I wanted to quickly adress some feedbacks and problems with the jam build, so I published an update to the game. Don't know if Amp It Up! is going to become a full project, but I have some crazy ideas.  Let's see... As for the new things in this build:

Level Select feature on the main menu! yay
New final level! (Level 9)
Two input/pathfinding bugfixes that were very common to encounter. Now you should get stuck with phantom wires and stuff
Minor UI changes, text spelling mistakes corrected, etc

***
Amp It Up! is a strategy puzzle game where you use limited resources to connect generators to provide energy to buildings and structures in outer space. Power flows through the wires you placed in the grid, but you must plan your routes accordingly! Avoid obstacles, use relays and power every single building each level.
How to play: you only use the mouse buttons to play. Left Click interacts with buildings and place wires, Right Click deletes your previous wire and the Scroll Wheel changes between the two placement modes. Short tutorials are included in every level.
Try to complete all stages! And if you manage to find economic routes in the later stages, I'd love to see your solution :)
Solo-developed in 48hCredits to Kenney and KayKit for the assets
***
As with every Kenney Jam, only  asset packs published by Kenney or KayKit were allowed to be used.
The only bonus challenge I've completed is 3 - Mouse only (Although some levels do present the bonus challenge 5 - Symmetry) 
I think I wrote every pack in this game:
KayKit : Space Base BitsKayKit - Platformer PackKenney - UI Pack: Sci-FiKenney - Game IconsSome extra packs from Kenney Game Assets All-in-1
As for audio, I used some SFXs from Kenney as well mixed in with some random ones I purchased in a bundle some time ago. The music also came from another bundle. I don't think I managed to save the source/name though.

moreInfo.Rating: Rated 5.0 out of 5 stars(2 total ratings)
moreInfo.Author: pedroaurelio_n
moreInfo.Tags: 3D, Asset Pack, Mouse only, No AI, Point & Click, Sci-fi, Short, Top-Down, Unity

details.title: SparkNoid
details.description:
SparkNoid is a retro-style 3D/2D puzzle adventure built in just 45 hours by PixelPun for the 2025 Kenney Jam. Dive into a mysterious pixelart dungeon where each locked door hides 2D minigames and puzzles. Solve the puzzles, uncover secrets, and unlock one of two possible endings. Featuring music by JetDarc and crafted entirely with a single Kenney asset pack.
The trailer really makes me laugh... I did it in a 1990s cartoon theme song style using Suno for the music. 



Crazy puzzle dungeon SparkNoid Action! 


Explore the dungeon with "WASD" and mouse traditional first person controls. The puzzles on the walls are activated by finding the activation spot and pushing "F" button. Part of the game is finding these spots, some can be very tricky. Complete the puzzles, open the doors and explore the dungeon and help the SparkNoids.


Issues:
Currently the coin stage a tad harder then I wanted. You can still beat it but I guess when I edited the animations last minute (Dumb) It's harder for the little SparkNoid to fit on the left side. If you have problems with that puzzle it can still be beaten by jumping up the left side you have to fit between two tight blocks, but is 100% possible. So far that's the only thing I've caught that's not what I intended.  You can also get the coin from the right side, it's an easier climb but a harder jump.
Finding the puzzle triggers
Most puzzles you need to be about 5 to 8 feet away from the wall, the gif above is a good indication of about how far you need to be. Most puzzles the entire stage should fit on the screen to start the puzzle level.
I do have an update for this once the jam is over.

Update 8-22-05
Downloadable versions for Mac, Windows and Linux 
Update 8-14-05
Added full controller support for xbox style controllers.
When in the 3D dungeon you use the analog controls and the "Y" button to trigger puzzles (I haven't added the prompts will still show "F") and to pick up and interact with the world.When in the 2D sections you use the D-pad and the "A" button to jump.
Somewhat fixed the jumping on puzzle 3 (Seems that it's a tad more broke then I thought)
Updated the blue door ending :)
Random fixes
Much bigger update coming out at some point that brings the game closer to what I had in mind making it, originally platforming on the walls as a SUPER small part of the game :P

details.title: Pick me UP!
details.description:
⛏️Pick me UP!⛏️
In Pick me UP!, every click launches your pickaxe (or other tool of mayhem of your choice) skyward. Smash through different ores, stack power, and climb as high as you can before gravity takes its toll. When your clicks run out, it’s time to crash and crack the Big Bad Ore
The 2025 theme is... POWER!
📑 Rules:
Click the pickaxe to launch it upward (Keep in mind that your clicks are limited)Hitting ores grants effects (extra clicks, more velocity, gold)When you run out of clicks, the pickaxe falls with built-up powerSmash into the ground to 💥BREAK💥the ore below. If you reach the required power threshold you can go the next levelCollect gold (by breaking gold ores) to unlock stronger tools

🎮 Controls:
Launch: [Left Click] to send the pickaxe upwards.Propel: In mid-air, click on either side of the pickaxe to push it in the opposite direction
🌟 Bonuses:
During your climb in the Minesfaht, you will encounter ores and bonuses that you can collect by hitting them with your pickaxe:

The Gold Ore - collecting it will grant you 10 gold.The Diamond Ore - collecting it will grant you 2 bonus clicks.Dynamite - hit it to trigger a blast that sends you soaring even higher

ℹ️ Notes:
Think you’ve got what it takes to wield the almighty Golden Pickaxe of Destruction?  Collect 1,000 gold and see for yourself! Share your high scores in the comments and ejoy the game 💥**The first run may be a little bit laggy**

📢 Credits
created by Karrot Games : karrot_raa, karrot_fang- Main music Theme by Clemens H. a.k.a. "sauer2- Assets by https://kenney.nl/assets/ & https://kaylousberg.itch.io/

details.title: Running out of power
details.description:
You and your train, ready for a long journey ahead. The birds are singing, the sun rises on the horizon. Everything feels perfect... Until it hits you: you forgot to refuel. With the power to have left, you won't even make it a third of the way.
Thankfully, nature offers everything you might need: COAL. Wait… is that a lost traveler? Maybe they’ll lend a hand if you pick them up. And—is that a zombie!?
Head deep into the forest and scavenge whatever you can to power your train toward its destination. In this exploration game with roguelike elements, staying powered is everything. Keep moving, and you’ll uncover resources, allies, passengers... and perhaps even the undead. 

KENNEY Game Jam Notes
This game was made by me alone for the Kenney Game Jam 2025, held from July 18 to July 20. All assets used were from Kenney and KayKit. For the logo and background illustrations, I teamed up with Paloma (@corny_57). Big thanks to her for that part.
 
The version submitted for this jam is 0.2.0. The game isn’t as complete as I’d like it to be. There are two things to keep in mind. If you haven’t played the game yet, I recommend trying it at least once before reading further.
 
Police: The policeman isn’t implemented yet, so he doesn’t provide any benefits.
 Gold: Gold doesn’t have any use in this version. The idea was to add a shop during the run where you could buy train upgrades (like more space for passengers or better coal efficiency). This feature isn’t in version 0.2.0.
 
I plan to expand the game with more resources and mechanics that can change how a run plays out. Still, I’m leaving this text as it is, so anyone (including myself) can revisit the jam version. If you’re reading this in the future, hopefully, the game has come a long way!
Controls
The game can be fully played using just the mouse.You can play the game in its web version or download it to play locally on your computer. The dowloadable version is only for Windows. I'm planing on exporting for macOS and Linux in the future.

details.title: Maximum Voltage
details.description:
[Maximum Voltage]


Charge up your ship and wreak havoc in this short retro-inspired on-rails space shooter.
Photosensitivity Warning: This game contains high contrast flashing lights.
Made in 48 hours for Kenney Jam 2025. Models, textures, and fonts exclusively taken from the following packs:

KayKit Platformer Pack
Kenney Crosshair Pack
Kenney Explosion Pack
Kenney Game Icons
Kenney Mini Arena
Kenney Mini Square Font
Kenney Pattern Pack
Kenney Prototype Kit
Kenney Racing Kit
Kenney Space Kit
Kenney Space Kit (Legacy)
Kenney Space Station Kit
Kenney Tappy Plane
Kenney UI Pack - Pixel Adventure
Kenney UI Pack - Sci-fi

How To Play
Fill your ship's energy by collecting charges or flying through charge rings. With enough charges, you can jolt through the skies with a lightning dodge or unleash the devastating power of the turbo cannon.
Controls
A controller is highly recommended for the best experience.
Move:Left analog stick (XBox)WASD or arrow keys
Shoot:A Button (XBox)Space
These special moves can be executed when you've collected enough charge:
Dodge: Costs 1 chargeLeft analog stick + X (XBox)Hold WASD / arrows + Shift
Turbo Cannon: Costs 5 chargesPress B (XBox)Ctrl
Compatibility
MacOS has not been tested and may not run correctly. Play if you dare.
Credits
Coding / Design / SFX
Charles (Null Builds)
Models/ Textures / Fonts
Kenney (www.kenney.nl)Kay Lousberg (www.kaylousberg.com)
Music
"Box Jump" by Abstraction (https://abstractionmusic.com/)"Pixel War 2" by Abstraction (https://abstractionmusic.com/)
Beta Testers
James Daggs

details.title: ChargeUp!
details.description:
Futur or Medieval? Choose your side... and the Power will be yours!
Conquer and take advantage on the battlefield by powering the dimension edge, grab energy orb and boost your dimensional production.
You can also trick your enemy by grabbing malus or a bonus and taking the lead, the first one to push his dimension and reach the the enemies back win!
How to play:
Player 1: Z-Q-S-D  to Move / E to Charge production
Player 2: I-J-K-L  to Move / O to Charge production
Rules:
Collect yellow orbs to boost your production and deliver them to your towers.
Each time a tower receives an orb, you gain ground against your opponent.
After delivering five orbs to a tower, it upgrades—up to two times—for enhanced performance.
Helpful bonuses may also appear:
Star – Increases your speed
Snowflake – Freezes your opponent temporarily
Bomb – Downgrades one of your opponent's towers
Notes:
We recommend to play in full screen or with the windows build (same as the web)There are options to control volume, we recommend reducing it at the beginning
The Amazing team composed of:
DUBOIS Evan  (OthenTV): Programmer
GUYOT Augustin : Programmer
ALBANI VAN-FOUQUES Bryan : Programmer
ROMAGNY Valentin : Sound Design/ Music/ Game Designer

moreInfo.Tags: Fantasy, Indie, Local multiplayer, Top-Down, Unity

details.title: PowerTrack
details.description:
Build clever tracks to guide your toy car to the goal!
Collect power-ups, avoid obstacles, and make the most of every curve.
Created in 48h for the Kenney Jam 2025.
Controls
The game can be fully played with the MouseStart the car: SpaceUndo: XReset the car: RRestart the level: Backspace
Assets used
Kenney's Minigolf Kit : https://kenney.nl/assets/minigolf-kitKenney's Toy Car Kit: https://kenney.nl/assets/toy-car-kitKenney's Platformer Kit: https://kenney.nl/assets/platformer-kitKenney's Game Icons: https://kenney.nl/assets/game-iconsKenney's Interface Sounds: https://kenney.nl/assets/interface-sounds
Electric Boots font: https://www.dafont.com/electric-boots.font?text=PowertrackElectric Kiss font: https://www.dafont.com/electric-kiss.font?text=Thanks+for+playing

details.title: PowerBot! (KenneyJam 2025 Submission)
details.description:
(Playing Fullscreen is Recommended!)
Left Click To Move, Right Click to Break! Every Block is Breakable!
PowerBot! is the world's first and greatest robot to help humans, but can he pass the tests first? Powerbot has limited power in each stage so your every move counts. Every move, every jump, every obstacle you break... they all take a bite out of your precious power. Your goal is simple: reach the exit before you run out of energy. But be careful! One wrong move could leave you completely drained.
-Strategic block-based movement system
-Jumping, obstacle-breaking, and energy management
-Cute but challenging puzzle levels
-A simple yet colorful world built solely with Kenney and Kaykit assets

details.title: Mower Power
details.description:
=== Mower Power ===
It's a hot summer day, and your DIY lawnmower keeps falling apart. Luckily, you have the tools to fix it, and power stations everywhere to  keep it running.
A chill game for messing around with physics, building the lawnmower of your dreams, and breaking things. 
Made for Kenney Jam 2025, theme: "Power"(All visual assets from Kenney, electricity symbol made from grass)

details.title: Power Crane Fishing
details.description:
Game made in 48h for the Kenney Jam 2025With the theme "Power"
--------------------------------------
Overfishing is highly illegal... But who cares ?!?You're a mighty capitalist; Ready to do anything to increase profits !Use your giant crane and its faulty wires to electrocute as many fishes, as fast as you can.Sell the fishes and re-invest the profit into upgrades for your crane... To fry even more fishes !it's the virtuous cycle of life capitalism !!!Isn't it wonderful ?
--------------------------------------
Left / Right arrows : Move the craneWASD : Move the hookSpace : Electrocute
--------------------------------------

details.title: Graveyard Defense
details.description:
Summon army of skeletons to defend graveyard against invadersGain currency (power) when minions die
If minions health is low enough you can click it to sacrifice it gaining additional powerPower can be used to send new minions (by clicking graves) dow the lanesor upgrade future summons (by clicking shrine)
Submission for KenneyJam2025
Theme Power - kill minions for power, or test your skills in endless mode against exponentially scaling opponents

details.title: Lost Lantern
details.description:
Your lantern is all that is left to light up this world, make sure it doesn't run out of  power.
ControlsWASD - MoveMouse - LookLeft Click - Pulse LanternP - Pause
Originally made in 48 hours for the Kenney Jam 2025. All sprites, textures, 3D models, and fonts are from Kenney and KayKit packs.

details.title: Bouncing dungeon
details.description:
Game info
You play as three heroes on a quest to clear a dungeon. Pull them with your mouse to aim, then release to launch them. Each hero also has a special ability to help defeat enemies.
This game was made in 2 days during Kenney Jam 2025. All assets except for audio and music are from Kenney game asset packs. 
Controls
Mouse: for controlling the heroes and clicking buttons
R: reset level
P: pause level
N: mute sounds
M: mute music

details.title: Power Of The Art
details.description: Draw symbols with your hand and cast spells!

details.title: Power Fantasy
details.description:
mouse - aim
LMB - shoot
RMB + mouse - move character (think of a boat control, or shifting a gear)
(OPTIONAL)W/A/S/D - move character (click each button once, you'll get it.)

details.title: Power Through the Night
details.description:
Can you keep the power on and survive the night?
Vampires have taken over the world, things are looking dire... but you've managed to set up camp in an old tunnel, and have been able to fend off the vampires with UV lights. Recently, your power has been failing. Can you properly reroute and repair it in time to see the sun once more?
How to play
In 'Power Through the Night' your goal is to survive until daylight against an onslaught of vampires!
Pipe Management:
Click on power pipes to rotate them.If a pipe breaks (turns red) click on it to repair it.Reroute the power while the broken tube is being fixed.T-Shape pipes can only be toggled 90 degrees clockwise, every other pipe can bee freely rotated.
Light Management:
Click one of the 4 lights on the left side of the screen to toggle them,Lights consume power. Only Turn them on if neccesary.
Keep your power bar above 0, try to hold out until morning!

Credits
Created by: Chase Middleton & AlfieBackground Music by: Harrison BillianAdditional SFX: ZapSplat.com & Freesound.orgAssets Used:Space Station KitBuilding KitUI Pack - Sci-FiAnimated Characters 3Car KitBoard Game IconsFantasy UI BordersKayKit - Forest Nature PackKayKit - Forest Nature PackKayKit : Furniture BitsKayKit : Halloween Bits
Created for the Kenney Jam 2025

moreInfo.Author: SplendidDog
moreInfo.Tags: 2D, Arcade, Godot, Point & Click, Short, Singleplayer, Spooky, Top-Down, Vampire

details.title: A Bite at Barry's
details.description:
Your colleague had to call off their shift last-minute. Thankfully you're such a dutiful employee that you took up the work with only minimal threats!
It's only one night anyway, what's the worst that could happen..?
How to play
Swipe left and right to tilt your head,Turn on lights using the panel on your left, but don't use too much!Use the cameras on your right to keep an eye on Barry. Remember to turn on the lights in the room to see.Close the door in a pinch with the button on your desk,Stay safe out there :)
Submission for the Kenney Gamejam 2025. Made in 48 hours.

moreInfo.Author: WhySoup
moreInfo.Tags: 3D, Horror, Indie, Short, Singleplayer, Survival Horror, Unity

details.title: The Disaster Company Intern
details.description:
Requirements: Audio! Keyboard (WASD/Spacebar)!
Made for Kenney Jam 2025. I wanted to add a couple more levels as the workflow became really fast after getting the base systems done, but ran out of time since I didn't get to work on it Friday.
The idea was to be applying for a job at a company that handles disasters by sending someone in to avert them. You'd be a Disaster Manager, and your job would be to show up, figure out what's wrong and solve the problem so that nothing terrible happens. The intern test would be a short series of diorama tests - try to get the job by proving you can handle disasters! The super helpful Narrator guides you through the whole process!
Unfortunately things don't always go according to plan so you'll have to prepare for the unexpected!
Controls : WASD/Spacebar or possibly controllers (didnt test them)

moreInfo.Author: Lane
moreInfo.Tags: 3D, Funny, kenney-jam, kenneyjam2025, Sci-fi, Short, Unity
